productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Washed Blue Slim Fit Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has a looped waist with a zipper fly and button closure, two pockets on the front with a patch pocket above the right one that has an embroidered brand logo, two pockets at the back, contrast coloured buttons and metallic embellishments, and has stitch detailing Fitting Slim Fit Regular rise Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade All you denim fans out there, freeze your genes with this pair of jeans from Deni-yo. Designed for the true denim wearer, and crafted from quality cotton fabric, this washed jean makes for a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Wear it on a casual day out or when roughing it out with equal pride. Team it with funky t-shirts or classy casual shirts, and look great both ways. Model statistics The product is of length 44.5" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
